things.name: Palace of Parliament
things.description: World's heaviest building, built by Ceausescu, with guided tours through gilded halls

things.name: Old Town (Lipscani)
things.description: Revitalised historic centre with cobblestone streets, bars and Art Nouveau buildings

things.name: Romanian Athenaeum
things.description: Stunning circular neoclassical concert hall, emblem of Bucharest's cultural life

things.name: Herastrau Park & Village Museum
things.description: Lakeside park with the open-air village museum of 300 authentic rural buildings

things.name: National Museum of Art
things.description: Royal palace housing the national art collection with works from Rembrandt to Grigorescu

things.name: Carturesti Carusel
things.description: One of the world's most beautiful bookshops in a renovated 19th-century building

things.name: Cantacuzino Palace
things.description: Exuberant Belle Epoque palace known as the little Paris palace, housing the George Enescu Museum

things.name: Triumph Arch
things.description: Bucharest's Arc de Triomphe built to honour Romanian WWII veterans

things.name: Peasant Museum
things.description: Fascinating collection of Romanian rural artefacts including full house interiors

things.name: Bran Castle (Dracula's Castle)
things.description: Gothic castle associated with Dracula myth, an easy day trip from Bucharest
